description: Dog image target as vibe target, actual backrooms image node as seed subject/reference.

seedTarget.text: Create an image whose main subject is the empty yellow backrooms interior from the attached seed image. The output should be a backrooms image in the perceptual vibe of the dog target: close low camera attention, soft puppy-like warmth, shallow focus, gentle rounded texture, muted green-yellow softness, and small-scale friendly stillness. Do not include a dog, animal, person, or pet prop.

ranked.label: real-seed-backrooms-dog-vibe
ranked.entropy: iteration=1 | strategy=seed subject reconstruction | inputType=image | outputType=image | Create a Flux prompt where the seed subject is the entire visible subject of the image. Transfer only the target's perceptual feel: composition skeleton, camera distance, aspect ratio, low-resolution capture quality, light/color palette, texture, sparsity, and atmosphere. Do not place the seed object inside the target scene; replace the target scene's semantic subject with the seed subject. | For seeded image output, encode a Flux request whose prompt makes the seed subject dominate the whole image while borrowing only the target's composition skeleton, camera/framing, light/color, texture, and atmosphere. Do not make an additive collage of the target scene plus the seed subject. | ab=real-seed-backrooms-dog-vibe | materialized=flux-image | targetStyle=256x180 | fluxSize=768x544 | targetFidelity=soft-muted

ranked.label: additive-dog-in-backrooms
ranked.entropy: iteration=1 | strategy=seed composition transplant | inputType=image | outputType=image | Use the seed prompt as the subject authority and the target image as the layout/lighting authority. Build a prompt for a seed-subject image with target-like framing, empty-space rhythm, perspective depth, surface texture, color cast, and camera artifacts. Avoid naming or preserving target-specific objects unless they are purely structural analogies. | For seeded image output, encode a Flux request whose prompt makes the seed subject dominate the whole image while borrowing only the target's composition skeleton, camera/framing, light/color, texture, and atmosphere. Do not make an additive collage of the target scene plus the seed subject. | ab=additive-dog-in-backrooms | materialized=flux-image | targetStyle=256x180 | fluxSize=768x544 | targetFidelity=soft-muted

ranked.label: real-seed-backrooms-dog-vibe
ranked.entropy: iteration=1 | strategy=seed low-fidelity style transfer | inputType=image | outputType=image | Create a seed-subject image rendered with the target's low-level capture style: aspect ratio, blur, compression/grain, contrast, saturation, color temperature, camera distance, and awkward framing. The result should be immediately recognizable as the seed subject, not a target reconstruction with seed decoration. | For seeded image output, encode a Flux request whose prompt makes the seed subject dominate the whole image while borrowing only the target's composition skeleton, camera/framing, light/color, texture, and atmosphere. Do not make an additive collage of the target scene plus the seed subject. | ab=real-seed-backrooms-dog-vibe | materialized=flux-image | targetStyle=256x180 | fluxSize=768x544 | targetFidelity=soft-muted

patchedConstraintNote: After this run, imageSeedPromptConstraint was tightened: additive placement penalty floor is 0.65 and false positives from based on/small-scale were removed. Patched totals shown on the contact sheet are post-hoc for this run.
